# Wearmill

> Custom printed products for businesses. Screen printing, embroidery, and branded merchandise.

Wearmill is a B2B promotional products company based in Houston, Texas. We provide custom-printed apparel, hats, drinkware, bags, and branded merchandise for businesses of all sizes.

## What We Do

- Custom screen printing (1-color and full-color DTG)
- Embroidery on apparel, hats, and bags
- Branded merchandise and promotional products
- Bulk ordering with volume discounts (24 to 576+ units)

## Products

- T-Shirts: Gildan, Bella+Canvas, Comfort Colors, Nike Dri-FIT
- Hoodies and Sweatshirts: Jerzees, Hanes, Adidas
- Hats: Baseball caps, trucker hats, beanies, bucket hats, leather patch hats
- Polos: Gildan, Core365, Adidas, Nike Dri-FIT
- Drinkware: Mugs, tumblers, water bottles, pint glasses, stadium cups
- Bags: Tote bags, drawstring backpacks, cooler bags, laptop backpacks, duffel bags

## Pricing

- T-shirts from $6.49/unit at volume (576+)
- No setup fees on DTG printing
- Screen print setup: $25/color (waived at 144+ units)
- Embroidery digitizing: $35 one-time (waived at 96+ units)
- Free shipping on orders over $500
- 5% loyalty discount on repeat orders

## How It Works

1. Submit a quote request with your design and quantities
2. Receive a free digital proof for approval
3. Production starts after proof approval (5-7 business days)
4. Order ships directly to you

## Contact

- Email: hello@wearmill.com
- Location: Houston, Texas
- Website: https://wearmill.com
